title: 100g Light Blue Shredded Tissue Paper for Gift Boxes, Hampers and Gift Bags, Ideal Hamper Filling Suitable for Birthday Anniversary Wedding Party New Year All Occasions
features: Premium Blue Shredded Tissue: Superior softness from finely crushed paper. Preferred by crafters, retailers and small businesses alike.
100g Blue Shredded Paper: Vibrant, eye-catching protection for packaging. Enhances presentation and creates a premium unboxing experience for all items.
Function: This shredded blue paper is perfect for filling in those extra spaces you have in your gift boxes, bags or hampers, not only protect the objects safe but also make it looks elegant.
Perfect for Every Occasion: Birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, Christmas, Easter, Valentine's, New Year—and every celebration in between. Ideal gift filler for any moment.
description: Product Description Create Moments That Are Remembered Enocent – Where the Art of Giving Begins We believe every gift tells a story. Let our baby blue shredded tissue paper set the scene for yours. Discover the effortless elegance that turns your thoughtful gifts into unforgettable presentations. Product Details & Product Specifications Type Light Blue Shredded Paper Colour Light Blue Size 100g Texture Soft, fluffy strands Ideal for Gift Boxes | Hampers | Gift Bags | Easter Baskets | Luxury Gift Baskets | Wedding Favours | Christmas Gifts | Birthday Presents | Anniversary Presents | Baby Shower | Special Occasions | Product Packaging | Small Business Crafted for a Luxurious Feel & Flawless Presentation We’ve selected a premium tissue paper that delivers a soft, fluffy texture, setting it apart from ordinary shredded fillers. This soft shredded paper acts as a protective cloud for delicate items, from fine jewellery to cherished keepsakes, ensuring they arrive in perfect condition while adding a tangible sense of luxury. Create Stunning Gift Presentations with Ease Elevate your gift-giving instantly. Simply place this soft shredded paper into your gift box or hamper before adding the present. It acts as the perfect hamper straw filling, adding volume, colour, and a professional finish that impresses every time. Endless Creative Possibilities Gift wrapping and box filling (e.g., shredded paper for gift boxes) Hamper and basket stuffing (e.g., hamper stuffing filler, shredded paper for hampers) Themed parties and events (e.g., wedding confetti, Christmas decorations) Craft projects and DIY decorations Baby shower favours or Easter egg hunts Present Gifts Beautifully with Enocent Shredded Tissue Paper
